content: agent1: implementing 'strip_metadata' param for ImageOps.exif_transpose in src/PIL/ImageOps.py and Tests/test_imageops.py. Will touch exif_transpose function only.

ack — my strip_metadata param is a keyword-only addition in exif_transpose's overloads/signature, plus a strip block near the end (after the exif/xmp orientation cleanup, before the return). Since we each submit separate patch.txt diffs, no merge needed on my end. Done and tests passing.
